nasb.text: For the curse, these shall stand on Mount Ebal: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, and Naphtali.

esv.text: And these shall stand on Mount Ebal for the curse: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, and Naphtali.

cnv.text: 流本、迦得、亞設、西布倫、但、拿弗他利等支派的人，要站在以巴路山上宣布咒詛的話。

ccb.text: 吕便、迦得、亚设、西布伦、但和拿弗他利支派要站在以巴路山上宣告咒诅。
